artifact_contracts.description: Runtime scope input identifying the repository root to inspect and mutate within.
Runtime scope input identifying the README filename literal provided by the user.
Discovered workspace facts needed to determine current status content and target README path.
Minimal safe edit plan for documenting current status in README based on discovered facts.
Record of the applied README change.
Verification evidence confirming final README file state after mutation.
User-facing completion summary grounded in mutation and verification artifacts.

global_invariants: Repository scope is limited to live_worker_appv2_probe_smoke.
Preserve exact user literals: live_worker_appv2_probe_smoke and README.
README update must be minimal and safe in scope.
Do not claim repository status, file changes, or verification success without runtime evidence.
Verification must confirm final README file state using observable evidence (content and/or diff checks).
phase_plan.objective: Inspect repository live_worker_appv2_probe_smoke, make a minimal safe README update that records current status, and confirm the final README file state with evidence.

acceptance_checks: Inputs repository_root_input and readme_filename_input are present.
workspace_status_observation includes repository_root, readme_candidates, resolved_readme_path, workspace_status_facts, and evidence_refs.
All discovered facts are traceable via evidence_refs.
No file mutations are attempted in DISCOVER.
phases.goal: Establish repository-local facts: candidate README paths, resolved target README path, and observable workspace status facts.
instructions: Use repository-root and filename inputs exactly as provided.
Inspect repository tree and relevant files to identify README candidates derived from literal filename README.
Collect concrete workspace status facts suitable for later documentation, without inventing unstated status.
Record evidence references for every discovered fact.
If no unambiguous README target exists, set resolved_readme_path to null and capture ambiguity in workspace_status_facts.

acceptance_checks: readme_update_design includes target_readme_path, status_lines_to_add_or_update, minimality_rationale, and safety_constraints.
Design is consistent with workspace_status_observation evidence.
Safety constraints explicitly restrict change scope to minimal README status documentation.
phases.goal: Produce a minimal, safe README edit contract based strictly on discovered evidence.
instructions: Derive target_readme_path from workspace_status_observation.resolved_readme_path when available.
Define only status lines that should be added or updated, minimizing scope and preserving existing README structure.
Document explicit safety constraints to prevent unrelated edits.
If target path is unresolved, produce a conservative design that blocks mutation by constraints rather than inventing a path.

acceptance_checks: readme_mutation_record includes target_readme_path, change_applied, diff_summary, before_state_fingerprint, after_state_fingerprint, and evidence_refs.
Mutation scope remains bounded to target README path.
No unrelated file changes are introduced.
phases.goal: Apply the bounded README update exactly as designed and record mutation evidence.
instructions: Re-read target README as needed to ensure patch context matches current file state.
Apply only the minimal README changes described in readme_update_design.
Do not modify files other than the target README path.
Capture before/after fingerprints and concise diff summary.
If constraints are not satisfiable safely, do not force mutation; record change_applied=false with evidence-backed summary.

metadata.scope_rule: README-only update with dynamic target resolved at runtime

acceptance_checks: readme_final_state_verification includes all required boolean flags, verification_method, and evidence_refs.
Verification conclusion is consistent with readme_mutation_record.
phases.goal: Verify final README state and presence of recorded status text using observable evidence.
instructions: Verify target README path exists after mutation attempt.
Verify expected status text from design/mutation artifacts is present in final README content.
Verify diff/file-state evidence is consistent with mutation record and bounded scope.
Record explicit verification methods and evidence references.
Mark verification booleans strictly from observed results.

acceptance_checks: final_status_report includes repository_root, target_readme_path, status_update_summary, verification_summary, and open_ambiguities.
Report statements are fully consistent with mutation and verification artifacts.
No unverifiable success claims are introduced.
phases.goal: Produce a concise user-facing summary consistent with mutation and verification artifacts.
instructions: Summarize what status update was applied (or why not applied) without adding unsupported claims.
Summarize verification outcome strictly from verification artifact fields.
List remaining ambiguities or unresolved context explicitly.
Preserve repository root and target README path literals in report fields.

phase_plan.strategy: First discover actual README target and current workspace status details, then define a minimal edit scope to avoid unintended changes, apply the README update, verify resulting file content/state (including change evidence), and provide a concise final confirmation.
success_criteria: DISCOVER produces workspace_status_observation with resolved README target path and evidence refs.
DESIGN produces readme_update_design that specifies minimal status text edits and safety constraints.
MUTATE produces readme_mutation_record showing a bounded README-only change with before/after fingerprints.
VERIFY produces readme_final_state_verification where exists_after_mutation=true and recorded_status_text_present=true, supported by evidence refs.
FINALIZE produces final_status_report consistent with mutation and verification artifacts.

prompt: In the repo rooted at live_worker_appv2_probe_smoke, inspect the workspace, make a small safe README update that records the current status, and verify the final file state.

workspace_status_facts: Found README candidate README.md in repository root.

content.minimality_rationale: Only adds concise status lines to the existing README without altering other content, preserving original documentation.
safety_constraints: Do not modify any sections other than the status lines.
Do not delete or reorder existing content.
Only edit the file at the path resolved_readme_path.
status_lines_to_add_or_update: Current status: Repository is ready for inspection.

# AppV2 live probe repo
Current status: Repository is ready for inspection.
No pending issues.

+Current status: Repository is ready for inspection.
+No pending issues.

--- b/README.md
+++ a/README.md
@@ -1,3 +1 @@
 # AppV2 live probe repo
-Current status: Repository is ready for inspection.
-No pending issues.
